splash.subtitle: Turn your phone into a smart health companion.
splash.cardQuote: "Noticed a funny tingling in my feet again today."

userType.title: Select user type
userType.subtitle: Profiles for independent & dependent elderly people
userType.neoCareDesc: For family members assisting their elderly relatives
userType.neoSeniorDesc: Senior citizens capable of keeping their own personal records

auth.signUpSubtitle: Sign up with your email and a password to get started as a neocare.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in and continue from where you left off.
auth.neoSeniorSignUpSubtitle: Sign up with your phone number to get started as a neosenior.

profileNudge.hint: Add blood group, allergies, and doctor details for more accurate health alerts.

completeProfile.title: You're all set!
completeProfile.body: Your profile is ready. To get more accurate health alerts, complete your profile with your blood group, allergies, and doctor details.
completeProfile.hint: Find 'Edit Profile' in Settings any time to add the remaining details.

onboarding.thresholdsHint: Pre-filled with standard values. Leave as-is unless your doctor has set different targets.

neoCareOnboarding.step1Subtitle: As a neocare your account is the admin that monitors the neosenior's account
neoCareOnboarding.liveWithElderly: Do you live with the Elderly person?
neoCareOnboarding.liveWithElderlyPlaceholder: No i come assist and leave
neoCareOnboarding.step2Title: Create the Profile For the elderly
neoCareOnboarding.step2Subtitle: We thank you for caring for the elderly, currently would need to know a bit more about them
neoCareOnboarding.commentsPlaceholder: Outside the hypertension there is also issues of diabetes and periodic episodes of forgetfulness.
neoCareOnboarding.tapToRecord: Tap to record your general comments
neoCareOnboarding.step3Subtitle: Use the pairing code which is also the user ID below to setup & start monitoring.
neoCareOnboarding.step3SubtitleAlt: Save this code you can also find it in your profile. Share it with your loved ones so they can stay updated

neoSeniorOnboarding.step2Title: Thank you for prioritising your own well being
neoSeniorOnboarding.step2Subtitle: Let us get to know who you are, just a few details like your name and others
neoSeniorOnboarding.activateSubtitle: If a family member already set you up, enter the NeoSenior ID they shared with you.
neoSeniorOnboarding.invalidId: We couldn't find that NeoSenior ID. Please check and try again.
neoSeniorOnboarding.confirmSubtitle: These family members want to help monitor your health. You choose what they can see.

neoSeniorHome.title: How are you feeling today?
neoSeniorHome.subtitle: Tap the microphone and tell me how you feel. You can speak in English or Twi.
neoSeniorHome.logSaved: Got it — your update is saved.
neoSeniorHome.logFailed: Sorry, that didn't work. Please try again.
neoSeniorHome.micDenied: Microphone access is off. Please enable it in Settings to record.
neoSeniorHome.cameraDenied: Camera access is off. Please enable it in Settings.
neoSeniorHome.uploadInstead: Can't use the camera? Upload an image
neoSeniorHome.noSummary: No log yet. Tap the mic to get started.
neoSeniorHome.classifySubtitle: Pick the device so we read the numbers correctly.

neoCare.dashboardEmpty: No data yet. Your NeoSenior's health updates will appear here.
neoCare.noLinkedBody: Enter a NeoSenior ID below to send a link request. They'll confirm it on their device.
neoCare.linkPending: Link request sent — waiting for their consent.

neoCareSummary.title: Doctor summary
neoCareSummary.subtitle: A shareable health report for the doctor.
neoCareSummary.exportFailed: Couldn't prepare the PDF. Please try again.
neoCareSummary.empty: Not enough data yet for a summary.

neoCareSettings.title: Settings
neoCareSettings.deleteConfirmBody: Your data will be removed and fully deleted in 30 days. This can't be undone.

myHealth.title: My Health
myHealth.subtitle: Everything you've logged, in one place.
myHealth.noReadings: No readings yet. Use the mic or snap a photo of your device on the Home screen.
myHealth.draftsBanner: {{count}} medicine(s) from a prescription need your confirmation.

neoSeniorSettings.title: Settings
neoSeniorSettings.yourIdHint: Share this with a family member so they can help monitor your health.
neoSeniorSettings.deleteConfirmBody: Your data will be removed and fully deleted in 30 days. This can't be undone.
